title: Lazy Sunday Earthy Jam Rolls
description: A light and earthy Japanese-inspired dish featuring blackcurrant jam rolls that are both vegetarian-friendly and vegan-friendly for a lazy Sunday treat.
instructions: Mix all-purpose flour, ground flaxseed, sugar, and a pinch of vanilla extract in a large bowl.
Add room temperature butter gradually while mixing until the mixture resembles coarse breadcrumbs. The dough should be soft but not sticky.
Gradually stir in warm water to form a ball of dough. It might be slightly sticky; if so, add more flour or cold water as needed.
Divide the dough into 12-16 pieces and roll each piece into thin circles using your hands or a rolling pin. Keep them under damp cloth while you assemble the rolls.
Spread blackcurrant jam on one side of each rolled-out circle, leaving about 1/4 inch border around the edges.
Fold the open edge over the jam to seal and top with another roll circle if desired for added texture.
Place assembled rolls in a greased pan or baking sheet. Bake for 20-25 minutes until golden brown.
